title: Khaitan & Co announces Annual Promotions: 17 lawyers made Partner
description: Khaitan & Co has announced the elevation of 49 members to leadership positions, with 17 members promoted to Partner and 32 to Counsel.The Following lawyers have been made Partner:Abhimanyu Pal | Employment, Labour & Benefits | MumbaiAmit Agashe | Dispute Resolution | PuneAmruta Joshi | Real Estate | MumbaiAyush Nanda | Corporate | MumbaiBhagirath Ashiya | Energy, Infrastructure & Resources | MumbaiGaurav Malhotra | Corporate | MumbaiGovinda Tos
